holdings.n: State Street SPDR Portfolio Aggregate Bond ETF

overview.description: The Return Stacked Bonds & Managed Futures ETF (RSBT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund that holds a bond portfolio while utilizing a managed futures strategy. The fund uses leverage to stack the total return of its bond holdings with the potential returns of the managed futures. RSBT was launched on Feb 7, 2023 and is issued by Tidal.
